g.text: The controller depends only on two concepts - hardware is just one realization
A Teensy RGB LED is one realization; a fake
that records colors satisfies the same contract
with NO change to the application.
with FakeLed + FakeClock and checks the emitted
color sequence against the SOS program - no board.
The ports are the universal API. An adapter is chosen
at the composition root (main.cpp or the Arduino sketch);
the application is written once against the concepts and
never changes when the LED, board, or clock source changes.
